title: OpenAI and MoonPay Let ChatGPT Users Buy Crypto Without Leaving Chats
message_html: OpenAI and MoonPay Let ChatGPT Users Buy Crypto Without Leaving Chats ...
snippet: Crypto payments company MoonPay is now live in ChatGPT’s App Store. “We are officially the first and only crypto onramp integrated in ChatGPT,” the company said in a Friday (May 22) post on X. With this integration, ChatGPT users can search “MoonPay” in Apps, connect, and buy any token, according to
